title: Traumatic Amputation
immediate_steps: Apply a tourniquet above the wound if bleeding is life-threatening, or apply direct firm pressure
Treat the victim for shock (lay them down, elevate legs if possible)
Recover the severed part: wrap it in a sterile gauze or clean cloth, dampen it with clean water or saline
Place the wrapped part in a watertight plastic bag
Place that bag into another container with ice and water
avoid: Do not put the severed part directly on ice (it will cause frostbite and tissue death)
Do not put the part directly in water
Do not ignore the victim to search endlessly for the part
